title: techmap is broken on master, works on 0.9
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Use the following files: 
[testcase.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4367456/testcase.zip)

 
Run the command:
```
yosys -s script.ys
```

## Expected behavior

Yosys 0.9 produces the correct behavior and is able to output the foobar cell in the final output files.

This is with:
```
Yosys 0.9 (git sha1 1979e0b, clang 7.0.0 -fPIC -Os)
```

And the end of synth.v looks like:
```  (* src = "testmod.v:3|factorsyniomap.v:15" *)                                                
  foobar #(                                                                                                                                                                                    
    .A_SIGNED(32'd0),                                                                                                                                                                          
    .A_WIDTH(32'd4),                                                                                                                                                                           
    .B_SIGNED(32'd0),                                                                          
    .B_WIDTH(32'd4),                                                                                                                                                                           
    .Y_WIDTH(32'd32)                           
  ) _6_ (                                                                                      
    .A(b),                                                                                     
    .B(a),                                                                                     
    .Y(_3_)                                                                                    
  );                                           
```

## Actual behavior

With yosys master @ c34969d, I get the following behavior:
```
[...]
 Yosys 0.9+1706 (git sha1 c34969d, clang 7.0.0 -fPIC -Os)                                                                                                                                      
[...]
6.2. Continuing TECHMAP pass.
Using template $paramod\$mul\A_SIGNED=0\B_SIGNED=0\A_WIDTH=4\B_WIDTH=4\Y_WIDTH=32 for cells of type $mul.
<suppressed ~21 debug messages>
ERROR: Assert `p[0] == '$' || p[0] == '\\'' failed in ./kernel/rtlil.h:153.
```
